description:
Pair program and debug together through collaborative screen sharing that's made for engineering teams.


Today we are releasing version 8.11.14 of CoScreen. This will be the final software update for the product as we officially announce its End of Life (EOL).
After many years of helping teams collaborate and solve problems together in real time, we’ve made the difficult decision to discontinue CoScreen. CoScreen will remain available until July 31, 2026. After that date, it will no longer be accessible. We are deeply grateful to everyone who has made CoScreen part of their day-to-day workflows. Thank you for your feedback and for being part of the CoScreen community. Please contact support if you have any questions.
